headline: Stock Market Today: Oil Jumps 5%, S&P 500 Drops As Iran Strikes UAE Port
summary: U.S. stocks sank Monday as an Iranian drone attack on a UAE petroleum site sent Brent above $114, gold tumbled 2%, and FedEx, UPS and GXO cratered after Amazon expanded its logistics business

headline: EgyptAir Takes Delivery of First Boeing 737 MAX Jet; First of 18 737-8 airplanes leased from SMBC Aviation Capital to join Egypt's national carrier's fleet
summary: CAIRO-- Boeing and EgyptAir announced today the Egyptian national airline took delivery of its first 737 MAX. The 737-8 is the first of 18 airplanes leased from SMBC Aviation Capital to be delivered...

headline: BOEING CO : Jefferies maintains a Buy rating
summary: In a research note published by Sheila Kahyaoglu, Jefferies advises its customers to buy the stock. The target price is unchanged at USD 295.

headline: BOEING CO : Jefferies remains its Buy rating
summary: Analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu from Jefferies research considers the stock attractive and recommends it with a Buy rating. The target price is unchanged at USD 295.
